reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: They just go in your room whenever they feel like it
reviews.room_type: DELUXE KING WITH FIREPLACE MOB ACC W/ RI SHWR

reviews.title: Misleading details provided by property & no follow-up
reviews.positives: The hotel indicated that they sent a driver from Empire to pick me up but the driver they instructed was not from Empire and had no idea where the hotel was. I never got there nor did I ever hear from the property which I find really surprising. I could have been dead yet they never followed up.
reviews.negatives: Why did the hotel not provide accurate information about the company they used for transportation nor follow up with me on my non-arrival?

reviews.title: Not a 5 star hotel, only good location
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
It is not 5 star, no coffee machine, light buttons didnt work properly, i asked for a fresh orange juice which is normal in any star hotel and this is supposed to be 5 star.
They had my name wrong on the room & room tv. So couldn't even connect wifi, mini is not even at a 3 star.
Once we arrived it was so hard to communicate with the reception lady bcz of the vacuum cleaner loud sound.. even during the day.
This is a 3 star.

reviews.title: Luxurious hotel
reviews.text: 5 star hotel, 5 star service,  5 star location!

reviews.title: Hospitality non existent but nice rooms
reviews.positives: Suite was beautiful and breakfast was amazing. Plus for Aesop products.
reviews.negatives: When spending $800 a night, there was not much actual service provided. Things were slow, not thought of. We had put the clean room light on before we left for dinner for multiple hours and came back to nothing done. Ordered food and instead of leading the uber eats driver up to the room, they waited 20 minutes to bring me my order. Husband wanted to surprise me due to some recent news and they did nothing except say something (and ruin the surprise) when I was checking in.. very odd communication. Overall, for the price I would have paid maybe $300 a night. Will definitely stay at the Peninsula next time.

reviews.title: Big but classy
reviews.text: A bit large, but great location and a classic and classy feel

reviews.title: Over priced  hotel would not return
reviews.positives: The close proximity to great walkable shopping and dining.
reviews.negatives: Room phone never worked, made it impossible to use room service. They moved us to a new room where the heat didn’t work! A repair man had to enter our room in order to fix.  Very inconvenient, nothing was offered for said inconvenience.

reviews.title: This stay was extremely disappointing.
reviews.positives: We come to Chicago every 3 months. We like the location. The staff is always very helpful.
reviews.negatives: The room was not at the Waldorf standard. The bed was lumpy, the night stand drawer would not stay closed, and we repeatedly kept banging into to it during the night. The safe was inoperable. I did answer a text complaining about the bed, and they exited TJ changed it at 9:45 PM when my wife was already asleep.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 酒店服務還不錯，讓我們提前入住，但是游泳池沒開放，覺得不太好！服務還不錯👍

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: A number of things were wrong with our room from a missing bathrobe to a faulty bathtub plug and several other things. All were addressed quickly by very nice people. However, for the price of the room, all should have been addressed before we arrived. The toilet seat was replaced upon our complaint — we tried to fix it ourselves but found that the screws were stripped which means it had been slipping for a while. The bathtub and sink were heavily scratched with deep black marks which made them look dirty. This room was a corner one with a fireplace and a balcony — an extra luxury and all should have been perfect. Of the two nights, turn down service was only performed once — inconsistent attention to details that count at that price point.

reviews.title: Just needs to be a better experience for 5 stars.  The staff “smiles a lot” but come on, that’s really about it
reviews.positives: Clean, rooms a good size
reviews.negatives: Uncomfortable balcony patio furniture.  Broken elevator.  A disturbance by a poorly behaved guest in the breakfast area was ignored by the manager on duty, despite requests for him/her to ameliorate the situation

reviews.title: A luxurious and enjoyable stay in the heart of Chicago, with excellent service and beautiful design.
reviews.positives: Beautiful luxury hotel with an elegant atmosphere, very clean rooms, and an excellent location. The staff was welcoming and professional, and the overall experience felt upscale and relaxing.
reviews.negatives: The room overlooked a large parking garage, which took away from the atmosphere and overall energy of the room. For us, the view is a significant part of the experience and makes up about 40% of how the room feels.

reviews.title: Good trip great location ,  room was great
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
No coffee in the room 
At the restaurant and my chicken was very salty

reviews.title: Would stay here again
reviews.positives: I really enjoyed the breakfast the pancakes were very good and everything was made to my liking.
reviews.negatives: Kevin is really great i stayed at the Astoria New Year’s Eve for my 28th birthday had a mishap when checking in he defly worked it out for me and I really appreciate it had outstanding customer service and made me feel very welcoming to come back ! Really  appreciate him ! If you have any issue talk to Kevin he will hear you and make the best of the situation

reviews.title: Sumptuous Suites & Great Location to Shop Until You Drop
reviews.positives: A wonderful location for shopping and sightseeing. Well appointed, incredibly large & comfortable rooms.  Friendly, professional staff.
reviews.negatives: Key cards failed multiple times and had to be replaced. Breakfast was expensive.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Perfect location!
The Staff made sure that we had a comfortable stay.
reviews.negatives: Pool was closed.

reviews.title: Our First stay was really good
reviews.positives: The room was beautiful,  the amenities were very nice.
reviews.negatives:
More instructions were needed for first time guest. We weren't aware that reservations were preferred for the restaurant and speak easy. Our breakfast package wasn't explained. 
The bed wasn't very comfortable, too hard.

reviews.title: Would I revisit, YES.!
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly and helpful. The cleanliness of the hotel, the fact that you offer a car wash service.
reviews.negatives: I had to wait about 45 mins to a hour, for my room to be ready. Even though i had a scheduled check in time.

reviews.title: I really enjoyed my stay. First time in a 5 star Hotel, The staff lived up to my expectation.
reviews.positives:
I loved the breakfast, just thought it was too expensive.
Loved my room, it was awesome
Loved the staff
Loved being able to park my car on site and getting it whenever I needed it in a timely manner.
reviews.negatives: I was surprised the lobby was not larger, I expected to be wowed when I entered the building

reviews.title: Would consider staying again
reviews.positives: Room and lounge
reviews.negatives: View

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very clean and the staff very friendly.
reviews.negatives: Room service was horrible, the meat was burned outside and seemed not well cooked inside, plus very limited options.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The best staff ever.

reviews.title: Great team with an unbelievable attention to details and personal needs
reviews.positives:
The attention to details is an admirable trait of this hotel
I was contacted for any special requirements once I booked and those were met and in full
reviews.negatives: The team and the attention to details

reviews.title: Will be staying again
reviews.positives: Beautiful
reviews.negatives:
Construction going on 
Fairly expensive for on site cocktail and dining options

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.positives:
- Centrally located
- Cute entrance
- Good breakfast
- Amazing room, large, clean and comfortable, well equipped (coffee, robe etc.)
- Friendly staff
reviews.negatives: - Host could have provided a bit more information upfront (e.g. facilities, hours and access, breakfast etc.)

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: N/a

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was amazing!!! The staff went above and beyond for our stay! Would return just to stay here!

reviews.title: We loved our stay!
reviews.positives: All the staff were extremely nice and helpful!  Usually, there's one person who has an attitude but not at the Waldorf.  We were treated like royalty by everyone.  It was definitely a pleasant experience.  We can't wait to come back!
reviews.negatives: Don't change a thing.  Everything was perfect!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The  Waldorf has exceptional service, great location and and a phenomenally beautiful esthetic.
reviews.negatives:
Communication was a bit off with my luggage drop
Off.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
The speakeasy was great pricy but awesome - Bernards 10/10!
Cleanliness, loved the fireplace in the room!  Complimentary hot chocolate and apple cider was an extra bonus as well after a freezing day!
reviews.negatives: Server at the bar on Sunday was very unfriendly.  I only gave a 10% tip as a result.

reviews.title: Service was excellent, food very good, room incredibly comfortable.  Would stay again and recommend.
reviews.positives: The service was excellent from check-in to room service.  Everyone was very professional and courteous.
reviews.negatives: The view from the room.

reviews.title: wonderful bday trip for my granddaughter
reviews.positives: From the moment we pulled up to door until we checked out we were absolutely spoiled. The restaurant was amazing.
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The concierge service and the staff overall were absolutely incredible! Sheryl and the entire staff went above and beyond to make certain that we felt beyond cared for!

reviews.title: We had a wonderful time. Everyone treated us like family, thank you.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was delicious! Thanks!
reviews.negatives: Bed could have been a bit more plush.

reviews.title: Wish we could of stayed longer!
reviews.positives: I requested champagne and sweets to be delivered upon our arrival as we were celebrating our mother's 90th birthday.  They went above and beyond our expectations.  My mother loved the surprise!  The staff was thoughtful, courteous and always ready to answer any questions we had.  Thank you all for making our stay wonderful!
reviews.negatives: Nothing.  Our stay was great!

reviews.title: Exceptional!
reviews.positives: Gorgeous and comfortable hotel with an amazing staff!

reviews.title: Husband’s 60th Birthday Getaway
reviews.positives: This property is beautiful inside and out. If you happen to be in the area and want to indulge in a getaway that is beyond fantastic with top notch employees who provide excellent customer service, this is the place!!!
reviews.negatives: nothing to dislike - I enjoyed everything!

reviews.title: Everything was wonderful other than the food.
reviews.positives: We got an upgrade on the room without adding money, the room was great the view and amenities, staff and housekeeping did a great job.the Nespresso machine was a bonus and served us well, the property is beautiful and smells really good!
reviews.negatives:
We ordered room service and it was a big disappointment, the pasta was dry and chewy, the chicken Brest came with the skin and was undercooked.
We were planning to go to dinner in the hotel, but the room service made us to cancel.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very easy to communicate with staff before and during our stay
reviews.negatives: Could not get reservations to on sight restaurant.

reviews.title: Beautiful stay in a perfect location
reviews.positives: Beautiful room. Wonderful staff

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location and great staff

reviews.title: They were very accommodating and I will be booking again in the future
reviews.positives: Beautiful property

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved the customer service.  Top Tier
reviews.negatives: N/a

reviews.title: Perfection
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Beautiful place and area. Staff was excellent in general.
reviews.positives: Service staff was friendly and accommodating and the room and view lovely.  Very comfortable bed .  Shower room was nice as well. The fireplace added ambiance in the winter weather.
reviews.negatives: Restaurant lighting very dim. Hard to read the menu.  Service there was a bit off.  The waiter didn't bring any utensils with dessert.  Had to eat my creme brulee with a leftover knife.  We couldn't find him to get us utensils.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wonderful staff! Beautiful room!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great Hotel and we really enjoyed our stay here. Thank you.

reviews.title: Fabulous few nights in the heart of Chicago!
reviews.positives: Love the understated elegance of the Waldorf. The location is perfect and central to everything. Area is walkable with many restaurants and shops nearby. The hotel itself is “luxury” without being pretentious. I absolutely loved our room with a balcony and the staff was extremely accommodating and hospitable (a late checkout of 2pm is unheard of and so appreciated!).
reviews.negatives: My only complaint is that some of the bathroom fixtures are a bit dated/needing repair.

reviews.title: 5 star service, confort, and location
reviews.positives: Amazing service, the staff are exceptional at solving problems and helping out. My rental car developed a flat tire and the valets filled it with air so I could get on my way, all without asking!
reviews.negatives: A bit pricey but this is what this kind of service and hotel costs...

reviews.title: Vacación feliz en un hermoso Hotel
reviews.positives: Me gustó mucho el motor lobby del Hotel que tiene donde estacionarse con comodidad y las instalaciones y atención !
reviews.negatives: No me gustó que olvídanos unos artículos en la habitación y tardaron mucho tiempo para darnos respuesta para ir a recogerlos

reviews.title: Très bien mais trop cher
reviews.positives: Amabilité du personnel et la localisation
reviews.negatives: Trop de changement au niveau du personnel

reviews.title: Luxe au cœur de la ville
reviews.positives: Bonne localisation. Luxueux!!!
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.positives: J’ai aimé la sécurité, l’accueil et bien la propreté

reviews.title: Not great
reviews.positives: Location, overall looks
reviews.negatives: Terrible service. 1 hour to take the bags down. They removed my items from my room and finally after I made noise they gave it back after more than a day. The house car is never available.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Kyle and Cheryl, were very adept at complementing our stay with great service and thoughtful fetails
reviews.negatives: Construction at the main entrance impeded arrivals and departures

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: excellent

reviews.title: Would love to come back one day, it felt like a wonderful home to stay in.
reviews.positives: Loved the location and comfort but the best thing was the service from all the concierges. From the email welcoming us to the restaurant recommendations and bookings, we loved them - especially Sheryl!
reviews.negatives: The food at Brass Tack restaurant could have been better although Leonard's cocktails were exceptional.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything

reviews.title: I prefer over the 4 season
reviews.positives: The room, the concierge, the management
reviews.negatives: The minibar could be better

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Classic Waldorf Experience

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.positives: The staff is helpful and the location is great. The room was very comfortable and spacious. A more spacious room was offered as an upgrade, which we really appreciated. Cleanliness was top notch.

reviews.title: The epitome of luxury & excellence… we loved it.
reviews.positives: The suite on the 26th floor was outstanding
reviews.negatives: Nothing!!

reviews.title: Perfection
reviews.positives: I was impressed by the room with its incredible view and the fireplace. The staff, the room service, I could go on and on, but to make it short: my stay exceeded my expectations. I have stayed in the original Waldorf in NYC many years ago and I am so glad to have had another amazing experience at a Waldorf. A special thanks to Angel. 10/10 in every way and I will definitely be back next time I am in Chicago.
